subject: Mount the realm properites into containers
commit_message:
Mount the realm properites into containers

Fix a bug where the realm configmap was
created but it wasn't being mounted into
the containers so any changes being done
is not being reflected in the pods

Issue-ID: AAI-1700
Change-Id: I987c80a5f74ee3be5aaec6ffc9990efbae0f4c8d
Signed-off-by: Kajur, Harish (vk250x) <vk250x@att.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 3:

@Borislav, I fixed the issue. Can you please check this now? We need this change merged asap. I tested this change locally and its working. I am testing this in the labs but the networking there in our labs is taking a long time to pull a single image and might take a while before the whole thing gets verified.
